{"success":true,"response":"Process J09D has been executed end-to-end:

- Decision data for TOURS starting with `J09D` was copied to `J09D_temp`.
- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated according to the rules:
  - Per-HAUS EQUNR count: `< 3` → `KSA`, otherwise `EVU`.
  - Overwrites to `EVU` for:
    - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between `500–599`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between `900–999`
- Joined with `eablg` via `ANLAGE` = `Installation`.
- Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` via `EQUNR`.
- For each record, sales data was preferred over net data when present (net data cleared conceptually by choosing sales fields, otherwise net fields used).
- Final CSV `J09D.csv` was created with the required columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`,  
  `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`,  
  `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,  
  `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- 27,633 rows were exported to:

  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_900_values_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_42/J09D.csv`

- The CSV has been emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Temporary and intermediate tables (`J09D_temp`, `J09D_step4`, `J09D_step5`, `J09D_final`) have been dropped.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
Process J09D has been executed end-to-end:

- Decision data for TOURS starting with `J09D` was copied to `J09D_temp`.
- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated according to the rules:
  - Per-HAUS EQUNR count: `< 3` → `KSA`, otherwise `EVU`.
  - Overwrites to `EVU` for:
    - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between `500–599`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between `900–999`
- Joined with `eablg` via `ANLAGE` = `Installation`.
- Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` via `EQUNR`.
- For each record, sales data was preferred over net data when present (net data cleared conceptually by choosing sales fields, otherwise net fields used).
- Final CSV `J09D.csv` was created with the required columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`,  
  `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`,  
  `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,  
  `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- 27,633 rows were exported to:

  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_900_values_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_42/J09D.csv`

- The CSV has been emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Temporary and intermediate tables (`J09D_temp`, `J09D_step4`, `J09D_step5`, `J09D_final`) have been dropped.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09D` has been executed successfully.

Key results:
- Decision data for tours starting with `J09D` processed and enriched with `ENTSCHEIDUNG` according to the defined rules.
- Data joined with `eablg`, `net_master`, and `sales_master`, preferring sales data where available.
- Final CSV `J09D.csv` created with 27,633 rows at:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_900_values_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_42/J09D.csv`
- CSV has been emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary/intermediate tables have been cleaned up.
